info.title: VIGIA Verification Actions
info.description: APIs for querying road hazards and calculating verification scores.

/query-hazards.description: Path to query existing road hazards in the database.

get.summary: Queries the database for existing hazards.
get.description: Queries the DynamoDB database using a geohash to find existing road hazards reported in the same area.

parameters.name: geohash
parameters.description: The exact geohash string of the location to query.

/calculate-score.description: Path to calculate the final verification score.

get.description: Calculates a 0-100 trust score for a reported hazard based on the AI's confidence and the number of similar crowd reports.

parameters.name: similar_hazards_count
parameters.description: The total number of similar hazards found in the database for this specific area.

parameters.name: avg_confidence
parameters.description: The average AI confidence score of the detected hazard, expressed as a float between 0 and 1.
